subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book moveth and saith: "Glorified art Thou, O my God, and glorified art Thou, O my Lord, my Object of Worship and my Beloved!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب یمشی و یقول سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سبحانک اللهم یا معبودی و محبوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
